purpose: Per-parser-family AST-shape contract for the VHDL grammar. Same default-build gating as `systemverilog_v1.json`: the parser is on-demand-only and the cfg `has_generated_vhdl_parser` stays off in default builds.
doctrine: First run after the parser becomes available may hit a regression-lock failure because `current_content_kind` is a placeholder. Update on first calibration.

samples.name: minimal_entity
samples.drift_tracked_in: PGEN: VHDL per-family contract calibration on first parser availability + regen coordination follow-up
